feedback.details: Passed mmdc validation with exit 0. Contains explicit container IDs (postgresql-db, qdrant-kb, llm-switch-api), 10 directed relationships with protocols and ports (postgresql://:5432, grpc://:6334, http://:8500, https://:8200). file:line 22-30.

All 4 required containers present: postgresql-db, qdrant-kb, llm-switch-api, nomad-executor. Security zones (Database Tier VPC-private, Application Tier) explicitly annotated. Consul and Vault integrations shown. file:line 9-20.
Traceability matrix present mapping PRD Sections 3.2 and 3.3 to diagram elements. pgvector HNSW and Qdrant payload schema (embedding_vector, created_at, conversation_id) documented. file:line 41-49.

Sequence diagram complete with all 4 required flows: (1) Qdrant upsert with conversation_id:timestamp point ID, (2) PostgreSQL transaction with advisory locks, (3) Consul health check 30s interval, (4) Vault credential retrieval 15m TTL. file:line 53-81.

MD013 violations: Line 3 is ~260 chars (exceeds 120), Line 22 is ~140 chars. These must be fixed. Line 10 also exceeds limit. Code fences use correct language specifiers (mermaid, yaml implied). file:line 3,22,10.

Flyway versioning (V001__) documented with rollback procedures. PostgreSQL advisory locks (pg_try_advisory_xact_lock) documented. Qdrant catastrophic rollback mentioned but lacks explicit dimension migration steps for model updates. file:line 85-95.

TLS 1.3, pg_hba.conf restrictions (Nomad executor CIDRs), Vault pg_userpass mount, connection pools (max_connections=100, pool_timeout=30s), and RBAC (read/write separation for embeddings) documented. Minor: pg_hba references CIDR blocks rather than explicit IP addresses. file:line 99-112.

overall_summary: Architecture file demonstrates strong C4 modeling and PRD traceability. Mermaid diagrams validate successfully. Critical issue: markdownlint MD013 violations on lines 3, 10, and 22 with line lengths exceeding 120 characters require immediate remediation before production deployment. Schema evolution section should add explicit Qdrant dimension migration steps. Security hardening is comprehensive with TLS, pg_hba, Vault dynamic credentials, and RBAC properly specified.
